description: Configure a new laboratory procedure in LibreHealth EHR by building a hierarchy starting with a top-level Order Group named 'In-House Lab'. Within this group, create a Procedure Order named 'Comprehensive Metabolic Panel' using Procedure Code '80053' and Standard Code 'CPT4:80053'. Include three Discrete Results within the order: 'Glucose' (Code: 'GLU'), 'Creatinine' (Code: 'CREAT'), and 'Sodium' (Code: 'NA').
